findings.title: KPI.md KR3 deadline (2026-06-10) is 4 days away with KR2 missed and no active sprint — no chance of KR3 delivery
findings.detail: KPI.md OKR KR3 reads: 'Client #1 phase 1 staging URL reviewed and signed-off — DUE 2026-06-10 (depends on KR2).' KR2 (onboard client #1 via voice interview) has confidence 2 and no active sprint exists. KR3 depends on KR2, making KR3 effectively impossible. KR3 must be marked at-risk/MISSED and its confidence updated. The OKR note only mentions KR1 (missed) and KR4 (missed); KR3's impending miss is not flagged.
findings.fix_sketch: Update the OKR audit banner to add KR3 deadline notice (due 2026-06-10, depends on KR2 which is itself blocked). Lower KR3 confidence from 2 to 1 to reflect reality.

findings.title: STATUS.md 'In flight' section still references audit/nightly-2026-06-04 push as pending — 2 days stale
findings.detail: The In-flight entry in .omc/STATUS.md says 'audit/nightly-2026-06-04 — commit and push pending.' That audit branch was completed on 2026-06-04. The file has not been updated to reflect the current nightly audit session (2026-06-06). Per AGENTS.md §7 Always-list: 'Update .omc/STATUS.md at end of every session.'
findings.fix_sketch: Replace the stale 'audit/nightly-2026-06-04 — commit and push pending' entry with the current audit/nightly-2026-06-06 session entry.

findings.title: ROADMAP 'Now' section sprint window (2026-05-15 → 2026-05-20) is over 2 weeks stale with no updated planning cycle — needs current date context
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md header reads 'Now (current cycle — re-plan pending in SPRINT-2026-05-B; SPRINT-2026-05-A ran 2026-05-15 → 2026-05-20, incomplete)'. Today is 2026-06-06 — over 17 days since SPRINT-B was supposed to start. SPRINT-2026-05-B has never been created. The ROADMAP 'Now' section header does not reflect today's date or the fact that no sprint is active. The frontmatter last_updated is 2026-05-30 (7 days ago). Workers reading 'Now' see a stale heading that implies the situation is the same as it was on 2026-05-21. The 'Next' section already has a reconciliation banner (added 2026-06-04) but the 'Now' heading does not call out the 7-day gap since last audit.
findings.fix_sketch: Update the 'Now' section header to note that as of 2026-06-06 still no SPRINT-B has been opened, and update the ROADMAP frontmatter last_updated and footer date to 2026-06-06.

findings.title: RISKS.md last_updated in frontmatter (2026-05-26) and 'Last reviewed' column — no review since 2026-05-15 for most rows despite multiple audit cycles
findings.detail: RISKS.md frontmatter shows last_updated: 2026-05-26 but all risk rows show 'Last reviewed: 2026-05-15' (with the exception of R-010 which was reviewed 2026-05-23). RISKS.md review schedule states 'Weekly (during sprint): re-score open risks where status changed'. It has been 22 days since most risks were reviewed. With SPRINT-2026-05-B still unstarted, no sprint review has happened. Specifically: R-004 (Retell state loss), R-005 (webhook auth), R-006 (Claude rate limit), R-007 (synthesizer first-gen bad), R-008 (Tier 2 rollback failure) all remain at their 2026-05-15 scores with no evidence of review. Occurrence (O) for R-007 may now be higher given sprint slippage, and R-004/R-005 remain unverified since Retell account was never created.
findings.fix_sketch: Update the frontmatter last_updated to 2026-06-06 and add a 'Last reviewed' note to rows R-004, R-005, R-006, R-007, R-008 acknowledging the review gap (22 days). Per RISKS.md rules, S/O/D scores require HITL to change — do not change scores, only add review date acknowledgment.

findings.title: AGENTS.md last_updated (2026-05-26) and last_verified (2026-05-26) are 11 days stale despite audit activity since then
findings.detail: AGENTS.md footer reads 'Last updated: 2026-05-26 / Last verified: 2026-05-26 — nightly audit'. The 2026-06-04 audit made changes to AGENTS.md (§8 NG-7 description corrected, §2 CLAUDE.md clarification added per finding AUDIT-factory-20260604-04 and -08). These edits updated content but the footer dates were not refreshed to reflect the 2026-06-04 modification. The 'last_verified' should now say 2026-06-04 since that audit confirmed and modified the file.
findings.fix_sketch: Update AGENTS.md footer 'Last updated' and 'Last verified' to 2026-06-06 (or 2026-06-04 when the last change occurred — use 2026-06-06 for this audit run).

findings.title: DECISIONS.md last_updated footer is 2026-06-04 but frontmatter last_updated is also 2026-06-04 — both should now reflect 2026-06-06 audit run
findings.detail: DECISIONS.md footer says 'Last updated: 2026-06-04 (manually until generator wired)'. Today's audit should update this to 2026-06-06 if any DECISIONS.md content changes, or note that no new ADRs were added. The ADR count in the Stats section says 'Accepted: 10' but there are now 11 total (ADR-0011 accepted). The 'Accepted: 10' count should be 10 accepted + 0 superseded = 10 accepted, but ADR-0006 is now superseded and ADR-0011 is accepted, giving 10 accepted — so that count is still correct. The 'Superseded: 1' count is correct. The total '11' is correct. This is a footer date issue only.
findings.fix_sketch: Verify stats are correct (they are: 11 total, 10 accepted, 1 superseded). Update the footer 'Last updated' date to 2026-06-06.

findings.title: README.md 'Last updated' footer is 2026-05-26 — 11 days stale despite 2026-06-04 audit activity
findings.detail: README.md footer reads 'Last updated: 2026-05-26'. The 2026-06-04 nightly audit fixed 15 findings across multiple spec files. README.md itself was not directly modified in 2026-06-04 audit, but it references the sprint status (SPRINT-2026-05-A completed without full delivery) which remains current. However the 'Last updated' date should reflect when anyone last verified the file's accuracy. Since today's audit confirms the README content is still accurate, update the verification date.

findings.title: CHANGELOG.md 'Changed' section nightly audit entry for 2026-06-04 lists finding IDs but does not include the 2026-06-06 audit run
findings.detail: CHANGELOG.md records each nightly audit run in the [Unreleased] Changed section. The 2026-06-04 entry is present with details. The 2026-06-06 audit run needs to be added after fixes are applied, per AGENTS.md §5 ('Update CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] on every spec change').
findings.fix_sketch: Add a 2026-06-06 nightly audit entry to CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] Changed section after all findings are fixed.

findings.title: Multiple spec file footers show last_updated 2026-05-26 despite 2026-06-04 audit making changes — footer drift
findings.detail: ARCHITECTURE.md, UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md, NON_GOALS.md, SECURITY.md, INTEGRATIONS.md all show 'Last updated: 2026-05-26 / Last verified: 2026-05-26' in their footers, but the 2026-06-04 nightly audit modified these files (closing findings -04, -05, -06, -12, -13, -14, -15). The footers were not updated to reflect the 2026-06-04 modifications. This creates a mismatch between actual content change dates and displayed dates.
findings.fix_sketch: Update 'Last updated' and 'Last verified' footers in ARCHITECTURE.md, UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md, NON_GOALS.md, SECURITY.md, and INTEGRATIONS.md to 2026-06-06.
